mnemonics: GJ's Box-Jenkins Method: Just Analyze and Forecast (Remember the initials: GJ for Gwilym Jenkins, and BJ for Box-Jenkins, which is his famous collaborative method)
keyPoints: Co-creator of the Box-Jenkins methodology for ARIMA model building.
Emphasized a systematic, iterative approach to model identification, estimation, and diagnostics.
His work with George Box revolutionized practical time series analysis and forecasting.
commonMistakes: Attributing the entire Box-Jenkins methodology solely to Jenkins; it was a collaborative effort with George Box.
Forgetting the iterative nature of the method (identify-estimate-diagnose) and trying to apply it as a linear, one-pass procedure.
Overlooking the importance of model diagnostics and validation, assuming a chosen ARIMA model is correct without checking residuals.
